description_long: This is a knitted winter beanie featuring a thick, textured yarn construction with a prominent pom-pom on top. The main body of the hat is dark blue with a wide, light gray zigzag pattern encircling it. The pom-pom is a vibrant reddish-orange, adding a playful contrast to the otherwise subdued color palette. The knit pattern is chunky and soft, suggesting warmth and comfort for cold weather. A small, oval-shaped patch or badge is visible on one side, possibly indicating a brand or logo. The hat appears flexible and designed to fit snugly over the head, providing insulation and style.
description: A chunky knit beanie with a reddish-orange pom-pom, dark blue body, and a light gray zigzag pattern, featuring a small side patch.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full pom-pom and the zigzag pattern wrapping around the back.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated rear view, highlighting the pom-pom and more of the hat's left side.
description_view_2: Angled side view revealing the small oval patch and the continuation of the zigzag pattern.
description_view_3: Side view with the patch clearly visible and the pom-pom prominent at the top.
